title: CreatePlus
body:
[Datapack Version of CreatePlus](https://github.com/JieningYu/CreatePlus) | [Create Fabric Project](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric)

This mod enhance the compatibility around Fabric mods of Create Fabric. Requires Create Fabric.

Please report bugs/suggestions to the Github.

Supported Mods:
- Tech Reborn
- Farmer's Delight
- Alloy Forgery
- Applied Energistics 2
- Betternether
- Immersive Weathering
- Mores
- Promenade
- Unearthed
- Universal Ores
- Gobber 2
- Alloygery
- Mythic Metals
- Ecologics
- Croptopia
- Architects' Palette
- More Geodes
- The Bumblezone
- Go Fish
- Modern Industrialization
- Paradise Lost
- Blockus
- Oxidized
- Cave Enhancements
- Twigs
- Oh The Biomes You’ll Go
- Trinkets
- Biome Makeover
